markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, align on 2026 goals, and discuss renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Initial Results:** GrowthX content now drives 60% of blog traffic (8x growth) and ranks for 800+ non-branded keywords on page one, validating the initial strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift to Business Impact:** The focus is moving from pure SEO to directly linking content to pipeline and ARR goals, using the blog as a sales enablement hub.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Renewal Proposed:** A flat $15k/mo renewal was proposed for 5 articles/week, including content enrichment (visuals, case studies) and a free year of GrowthX's AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
  - [**Decision Pending:** Udemy will evaluate the proposal against internal priorities, with a decision targeted for the end of February to accommodate procurement timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Alignment & Goals

  - [**Initial Goal:** Drive non-branded organic traffic to the blog by leveraging Udemy's gated content and expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**New Goal (Stef Miller):** Shift focus from pure SEO to using the blog as a core sales enablement hub.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Augment internal capabilities (e.g., video, data viz) and provide authoritative content for sales to share with prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Key Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [AEO performance & LLM share of voice.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Content enrichment (visuals, case studies).](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [Directly linking content to business targets (pipeline, ARR).](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)

### Performance & Impact

  - [**Blog Traffic:** GrowthX content drives 60% of blog sessions, an 8x increase since publishing began in November.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [800+ non-branded keywords on page one.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [300+ in top 3 positions.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [600+ on page two, primed for future growth.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**AEO Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [The "AI upskilling" article is a top Google result and a primary citation in the AI Overview.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Udemy Business is cited directly in AI responses.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [**Attribution Challenge:** A significant portion of AI traffic appears as "direct" in analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
      - [**Reason:** AI engines (e.g., free ChatGPT plans) often don't pass referrer data.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
      - [**Impact:** This undercounts the true value of content, as 20–60% of AI traffic can be misattributed.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)

### Future Strategy & Renewal

  - [**Proposed Strategy:** A two-pronged approach balancing AEO and traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
      - [**Social Research:** Capture early, high-intent topics before they have high search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2983.0)
      - [**Competitive Gaps:** Target known, high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2983.0)
      - [**Content Enrichment:** Add visuals, case studies, and data tables to improve UX and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
  - [**Product Messaging:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
      - [**Teams Plan:** Position as a lightweight entry point to Enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3212.0)
      - [**New Partners:** Create content for new offerings like M-Train (compliance training).](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
  - [**Renewal Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
      - [**Cost:** Flat $15k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** 5 articles/week, content enrichment, SEO/AEO tracking, and content audits.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3544.0)
      - [**Bonus:** One free year of GrowthX's AI visibility tool, which offers faster data on new prompts than BrightEdge.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Udemy:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)
      - [Evaluate the renewal proposal against internal priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)
      - [Provide a decision by the end of February to meet procurement timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)
      - [Share updated product documentation and sales call recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3114.0)
      - [Meet internally to define a GA4 event tracking strategy for organic content.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3667.0)
      - [Share the detailed strategy document.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
      - [Align AEO tracking prompts with Udemy's BrightEdge setup.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=3356.0)
      - [Record a Loom video explaining the "direct traffic" attribution issue.](https://fathom.video/share/v5s7KSk6nBazNbncx2DJwujSx9zA-MhL?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
